checks.name: Function defined
checks.feedback: Define at least one function using the function keyword

checks.name: Function called
checks.test: grep -rh 'function ' submissions/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v '//' | grep -q '(' && grep -rh '\w\+()\|\w\+([^)]' submissions/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'function ' | grep -q '.'
checks.feedback: Call your function somewhere in your code

checks.name: return statement
checks.feedback: Your function should return a value
